untranslatable_reason: Adam & Eve Double Bottom pattern requires multi-bar chart pattern recognition (identification of two consecutive bottoms and resistance level formation). This cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator comparisons and allowed operators. The source text references 'pattern completion and breakout above resistance' which requires pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxies: Used pivot points (r1/s1) as resistance/support approximation for breakout confirmation, and volume confirmation as typical pattern breakout validation. However, the core pattern identification (two consecutive bottoms) is not translatable. Success rates from source (78% bull, 40% avg rise) recorded but cannot be enforced in rule engine. Hold period approximated at 42 days based on source 'formation end to breakout' statistic.
